title: Walr - Dermatology AI Diagnostics
problem: Skin condition diagnosis requires specialist dermatologist expertise, leading to long wait times and delayed treatment.
solution: AI-powered skin analysis tool helping GPs and patients identify potential skin conditions from smartphone photos.
technology: Computer vision, deep learning, image analysis
regulatory_notes: Medical device classification for diagnostic claims.
varden_fit: Moderate-High — dermatology AI could integrate with Varden's specialist referral workflow.
notes: Dermatology AI. Similar to SkinVision but Swedish-focused.
